meta.home_title: LivingApple — Holiday Apartments in Scauri, Italy
meta.home_description: Holiday apartments in Scauri, Lazio. Between Rome and Naples, steps from the Gulf of Gaeta. Book directly with no commission.

login.title: Guest Portal
login.subtitle: Log in with your booking number and arrival date.
login.errorGeneric: Booking not found or incorrect arrival date.
login.errorFields: Please enter your booking ID and arrival date.
login.rateLimitedMsg: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

dashboard.title: Guest Portal
dashboard.depositCancel: Payment cancelled. You can try again at any time.

deposit.title: Security deposit
deposit.description: The security deposit protects the property against possible damages. Choose how you prefer to pay it.
deposit.offlineStep1: Present your Credit Card (no Debit Card) to the receptionist upon arrival.
deposit.offlineStep2: The receptionist fills in the deposit form for you to sign.
deposit.offlineStep3: The form will be destroyed within 8 hours of your departure.
deposit.offlineStep4: No charge or hold on the card.
deposit.offlineNote: You can switch to online payment from this page at any time.
deposit.stripeBullet1: Pre-authorization: amount is blocked on your card, not charged.
deposit.stripeBullet2: Amount released automatically at the end of your stay.
deposit.stripeBullet3: Your card details are never shared with us.
deposit.btnPay: Register the security deposit without showing your card
deposit.stripeNote: You will be redirected to Stripe.
deposit.authorizedMsg: Pre-authorization complete. Amount is blocked on your card and will be released at check-out if there are no damages.

checkin.title: Self Check-in
checkin.rejectNote: Contact the host via message or WhatsApp.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Check-in from 3:00 PM, check-out by 10:00 AM. Luggage storage on request.
faq.q2: How does the offline deposit work?
faq.a2: Present yourself to the receptionist with your Credit Card (no Debit Card) upon arrival. You will sign a form that will be destroyed within 8 hours of your departure. No charge or hold on the card.
faq.q3: How does the online deposit (Stripe) work?
faq.a3: Stripe pre-authorizes the amount on your card without charging it. At checkout the amount is released automatically if no damages.
faq.q4: What if self check-in is rejected?
faq.a4: The rejection message explains the reason. Message the host or contact us via WhatsApp.
faq.a6: Yes, you can request a camping cot with bedding included at a cost of €40 per stay. Book it at least 72 hours in advance by contacting the host via WhatsApp at +39 328 313 1500.

beds.title: Where you'll sleep
beds.subtitle: Set up your beds in just a few taps. Everything will be ready exactly as you want it, with no surprises — for a perfect holiday from the very first moment.
beds.warningTooFew: Note: the configured sleeping places are fewer than the guests in your booking.
beds.cribTitle: Do you need a baby cot?
beds.cribDesc: Camping cot with bedding included — €50 per stay. Book at least 72 hours in advance.

changeRequest.title: Request a change
changeRequest.step1Hint: What would you like to change? You can select multiple options.
changeRequest.step3Hint: Review the summary and submit your request.
changeRequest.aptPlaceholder: Which apartment would you prefer? (e.g. Fuji, Renetta...)
changeRequest.sentSub: We will get back to you within 24 hours.
changeRequest.errorSend: Error sending the request. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
